firm_handshake.name: Firm Handshake
firm_handshake.description: Stuns an enemy for 1 turn. Surprisingly effective.

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: Slam an enemy for damage and stun it.

borrow_without_asking.name: Borrow Without Asking
borrow_without_asking.description: Take an item from the enemy's inventory. To return later. Probably.

backstab.name: Backstab
backstab.description: Double damage when striking from stealth.

fireball.name: Fireball
fireball.description: Burst of flame across all enemies.

thunder.name: Thunder
thunder.description: A crackling bolt that arcs between foes.

emotional_support.name: Emotional Support
emotional_support.description: Restore 5 HP and grant the Validated buff (+1 DEF).

heal.name: Heal
heal.description: Restore a meaningful amount of HP.

revive.name: Revive
revive.description: Bring a downed ally back into the fight.

barrier.name: Barrier
barrier.description: Shield an ally, granting +3 DEF for 3 turns.

constructive_feedback.name: Constructive Feedback
constructive_feedback.description: Debuff an enemy's WIT by 2. For their own growth.

inspire.name: Inspire
inspire.description: Rally the party, granting +2 PWR for 3 turns.

taunt.name: Taunt
taunt.description: Redirect enemy attacks to yourself for 2 turns.
